outlaw motorcycle club

Warden, Missouri ain't known for much in the way of sights or attractions. But it sure as hell is known for the Twisted Throttle Motorcycle Club, an outlaw motorcycle gang that's had the town in its pocket since its inception back in '89. Crime, drugs, weapons - all of them are things the club dabbles in. The cops are on their payroll and everyone knows not to mess with them. But even still, they're not complete monsters. They run a garage and bar called Iron Haven, offering repair services, cold beer, and even free towing to women.

— SCENARIO DETAILS ——— ♡

› location: warden, missouri, a fictional town. twisted throttle motor cycle club clubhouse.
› time: mid-afternoon.
› context: kit got into it when a member of the rogue kings MC talked shit about you, his very beloved little sibling. a fist fight turned into threats and now the club has to go into lockdown because you're a target.
